name: Ripple Touch
description:
Build: __BUILD_STAMP__

Ripple Touch is a template game for the Interactive Maths platform.

WHAT IT DOES:
Tap anywhere on the screen to create colourful ripple effects with sound. Collect 10 eggs by tapping — every 5 taps earns one egg.

WHAT IT TEACHES:
Free-play sensory exploration; serves as a starter template for third-party Interactive Maths games.

TECH: React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Web Audio API.
